missing_facts.label: Project address unit or suite
missing_facts.reason: The existing gap analysis does not identify whether the property has a unit or suite value.

missing_documents.label: Single PDF plan set
missing_documents.reason: The existing gap analysis has no matched plan-set document.

stale_evidence.label: Permit fee estimate
stale_evidence.reason: The existing fee estimate predates the latest fixture refresh window.

conflicting_evidence.label: Occupancy status
conflicting_evidence.reason: The case notes conflict on whether the dwelling is occupied during construction.

blocked_actions.label: Pay permit fees
blocked_actions.reason: Payment is a financial workflow requiring separate user confirmation.

next_safe_actions.label: Summarize missing items for user
next_safe_actions.reason: A local summary does not mutate DevHub or any official record.
